recommendations.title: Gigi & Nate
recommendations.overview: A young man with a bright future suffers a near-fatal accident and recreates his new life with the help of an unlikely animal friend.

recommendations.title: Driven
recommendations.overview: FBI informant Jim Hoffman lures troubled automobile magnate John DeLorean to an undercover sting for cocaine trafficking.

recommendations.title: Killing Bono
recommendations.overview: The true story of Neil and Ivan McCormick, two Irish brothers who attempt to become rock stars but can only look on as their high school friends U2 become the biggest band in the world.

recommendations.title: Godsend
recommendations.overview: A couple agree to have their deceased son cloned under the supervision of an enigmatic doctor, but bizarre things start to happen years after his rebirth.

recommendations.title: Medieval
recommendations.overview: The story of fifteenth century Czech icon and warlord, Jan Zizka, who defeated armies of the Teutonic Order and the Holy Roman Empire.

recommendations.title: The Hole
recommendations.overview: Four teenagers at a British private school secretly uncover and explore the depths of a sealed underground hole created decades ago as a possible bomb shelter.

recommendations.title: Arthur & Merlin: Knights of Camelot
recommendations.overview: King Arthur returns home after fighting the Roman Empire. His illegitimate son has corrupted the throne of Camelot and King Arthur must reunite with the wizard Merlin and the Knights of the Round Table to fight to get back his crown.

recommendations.title: Airlift
recommendations.overview: When Iraq invades Kuwait in August, 1990, a callous Indian businessman becomes the spokesperson for more than 170,000 stranded countrymen.

recommendations.title: Ben-Hur
recommendations.overview: In ancient Judea, a Jewish aristocrat opposing Roman occupation of his homeland reunites with his childhood friend, now a Roman commander — setting in motion a saga of betrayal, adventure, tragedy, revenge, and faith.

recommendations.title: 3096 Days
recommendations.overview: A young Austrian girl is kidnapped and held in captivity for eight years. Based on the real-life case of Natascha Kampusch.
